scripts.test: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const html=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8'); const css=fs.readFileSync('style.css','utf8'); const js=fs.readFileSync('app.js','utf8'); const data=fs.readFileSync('data.js','utf8'); console.assert(html.includes('chronicle'), 'HTML missing chronicle'); console.assert(css.includes('--void'), 'CSS missing --void'); console.assert(js.includes('CHRONICLE_DATA'), 'JS missing data ref'); console.assert(data.includes('CHRONICLE_DATA'), 'Data missing'); console.log('PASS: All core files intact');"
